case_title: RUBENSTEIN, MARGUERITE VS KANZAWA, PEGGY MITSUE

docket_entries.description: PLTF'S EXHIBITS RETURNED, PICKED UP BY SON AUTHORIZATION LETTER FROM PLTF'S FILED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KANZAWA, PEGGY MITSUE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUBENSTEIN, MARGUERITE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KANZAWA, PEGGY MITSUE $4,055.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,160.00, AWARD INCLUDES $1000 FOR PAIN AND SUFFERING. THIS JUDGMENT DOES NOT PRECLUDE TRIAL OF THE ISSUE AS TO CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S LIABILITY. SEE GONZALES VS CITY OF SAN JOSE, 125 CAL APP. 4TH 1127, 1138-39 (2004) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KANZAWA, PEGGY MITSUE
FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED AS TO DEFENDANT KANSAWA, PEGGY MITSUE.
